name: bronze-tech
description: Bronze Tech is a leading manufacturer of high-quality electrical connectors and interconnect solutions. As an authorized distributor, we offer comprehensive product selection and application support, covering board-to-board connectors, wire-to-board connectors, circular connectors, and custom interconnect solutions for industrial, automotive, and consumer electronics applications.
longDescription: Founded in 1985 and headquartered in Germany, Bronze Tech has established itself as a global leader in electrical interconnect technology. The company specializes in developing innovative connector solutions that meet the highest standards of reliability and performance. Bronze Tech products are widely used in industrial automation, automotive systems, medical devices, telecommunications, and consumer electronics. With over 35 years of experience, Bronze Tech has built a reputation for quality, innovation, and customer-focused solutions. Their state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities and rigorous quality control processes ensure that every connector meets or exceeds industry standards. As an authorized distributor of Bronze Tech, LiTong Electronics provides full product selection, technical support, and application solutions to help customers achieve reliable and efficient interconnect designs. Our FAE team has extensive connector design experience and can provide customers with full-process support from concept to mass production.

seoMetaTitle: Bronze Tech Distributor | Board-to-Board & Circular Connectors | LiTong
seoMetaDescription: Authorized Bronze Tech distributor offering board-to-board, wire-to-board, and circular connectors. Technical support for industrial and automotive interconnect solutions.

faqs.question: Is LiTong an authorized distributor of Bronze Tech?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong Electronics is an authorized distributor of Bronze Tech products. We have established a strong partnership with Bronze Tech to provide customers with genuine products, comprehensive technical support, and reliable supply chain services. Our FAE team has received professional training from Bronze Tech and can provide expert guidance on product selection, application design, and troubleshooting for all types of connectors.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to verify our distributor status and get the latest product information, pricing, and technical documentation.

faqs.question: What types of connectors does Bronze Tech offer?
faqs.answer: Bronze Tech offers a comprehensive range of connector solutions: 1) Board-to-Board Connectors - High-density connectors for compact PCB designs with various pin pitches and configurations. 2) Wire-to-Board Connectors - Reliable connections for wire harnesses to PCBs with crimp and IDC termination options. 3) Circular Connectors - Rugged industrial-grade connectors with IP67 protection for harsh environments. 4) Custom Interconnect Solutions - Tailored connector designs for specific application requirements. All products meet international standards and are available in various materials and plating options.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our product categories to find the right Bronze Tech connector for your application, or contact our FAE team for personalized recommendations based on your specific requirements.

faqs.question: How do I select the right Bronze Tech connector for my application?
faqs.answer: Selecting the right Bronze Tech connector involves several steps: 1) Define electrical requirements - current rating, voltage, signal type (power, signal, or mixed). 2) Determine mechanical constraints - board space, mating cycles, insertion/withdrawal forces. 3) Consider environmental conditions - temperature range, humidity, vibration, IP rating requirements. 4) Choose termination method - SMT, through-hole, crimp, or IDC based on manufacturing process. 5) Verify compliance requirements - UL, RoHS, REACH, automotive standards. Our FAE team can guide you through this selection process and provide samples for evaluation.
faqs.decisionGuide: Download our connector selection guide or contact our FAE team for personalized product recommendations based on your specific application requirements.

faqs.question: What industries are Bronze Tech connectors used in?
faqs.answer: Bronze Tech connectors serve a wide range of industries: 1) Industrial Automation - PLCs, sensors, actuators, and control systems requiring reliable connections in harsh environments. 2) Automotive - EV charging systems, battery management, ADAS, and infotainment with AEC-Q200 qualified products. 3) Medical Devices - Diagnostic equipment, patient monitors, and surgical devices requiring high reliability and biocompatibility. 4) Telecommunications - 5G infrastructure, data centers, and networking equipment with high-speed signal integrity. 5) Consumer Electronics - Appliances, wearables, and smart home devices. Each industry has specific requirements that Bronze Tech addresses with specialized product lines.
faqs.decisionGuide: Explore our solutions section to see industry-specific connector applications, or contact our FAE team for application-specific recommendations.
